description: Subscription Linking lets publishers link their subscribers' accounts and synchronize reader entitlements with Google. The API manages publication readers and their subscription entitlements.
summary: One REST API surface: the Reader Revenue Subscription Linking API at `https://readerrevenuesubscriptionlinking.googleapis.com/v1`, documented by Google and described by an OpenAPI document; it accepts either a Google Cloud API key or Google OAuth 2.0 access token/service-account credentials.
